# Authority State Invariance Fixture Corpus v0.1

- `valid/` contains structurally conformant cases.
- `invalid/` contains cases expected to be rejected with exact error-code sets.
- `schema-samples/` contains one standalone valid instance for each event schema.

The corpus tests structural invariants only. Passing does not establish truth, compliance, authority-basis sufficiency, permission to execute, answerability, liability, production readiness, or endorsement.
